title: Inside Lisa's First Met Gala Look | The Final Fitting | Vogue
description:
"When I wear black I feel powerful." Watch as k-pop star Lisa gets ready for her first Met Gala. Lisa wears a Louis Vuitton dress, styled by Pharrell and embroidered with artist Henry Taylor's work.

Director: Emmie America
Director of Photography: Matt P. Jones
Editors: Michael Penhollow, William Long
Producer: Rashida Josiah
Associate Producer: Anisa Kennar
Associate Producer, On Set: Caleb Miner
Assistant Camera: Kelley Grade
Audio: Amelia Palmer
Artist: Henry Taylor
RTW And Footwe
